initial_program:
row(0).
row(1).
row(2).
col(0).
col(1).
col(2).

output_cell(R_out,C_out) :- row(R_out), col(C_out).

pos(R_in,C_in,V_in,Pos) :-
    input(R_in,C_in,V_in), V_in != 0,
    Pos = #count{ R2,C2,V2 : input(R2,C2,V2), V2 != 0, C2 < C_in } +
          #count{ R2 : input(R2,C_in,V2), V2 != 0, R2 < R_in }.

output(R_out,C_out,V_out) :-
    input(R_in,C_in,V_in),
    pos(R_in,C_in,V_in,Pos),
    (R_out * 3) + C_out = Pos,
    output_cell(R_out,C_out),
    color(V_out).

1 { output(R_out,C_out,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R_out,C_out).

rounds.program_after:
row(0).
row(1).
row(2).
col(0).
col(1).
col(2).

output_cell(R_out,C_out) :- row(R_out), col(C_out).

pos(R_in,C_in,V_in,Pos) :-
    input(R_in,C_in,V_in), V_in != 0,
    Pos = N1 + N2.
cnt_before(R_in,C_in,N1) :- input(R_in,C_in,V_in), V_in != 0, N1 = #count{R2,C2,V2 : input(R2,C2,V2), V2 != 0, C2 < C_in}.
cnt_samecol(R_in,C_in,N2) :- input(R_in,C_in,V_in), V_in != 0, N2 = #count{R2 : input(R2,C_in,V2), V2 != 0, R2 < R_in}.

output(R_out,C_out,V_out) :-
    input(R_in,C_in,V_in),
    pos(R_in,C_in,V_in,Pos),
    (R_out * 3) + C_out = Pos,
    output_cell(R_out,C_out),
    color(V_out).

1 { output(R_out,C_out,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R_out,C_out).

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
row(0).
row(1).
row(2).
col(0).
col(1).
col(2).

output_cell(R_out,C_out) :- row(R_out), col(C_out).

pos(R_in,C_in,V_in,Pos) :-
    input(R_in,C_in,V_in), V_in != 0,
    Pos = N1 + N2.
cnt_before(R_in,C_in,N1) :- input(R_in,C_in,V_in), V_in != 0, N1 = #count{R2,C2,V2 : input(R2,C2,V2), V2 != 0, C2 < C_in}.
cnt_samecol(R_in,C_in,N2) :- input(R_in,C_in,V_in), V_in != 0, N2 = #count{R2 : input(R2,C_in,V2), V2 != 0, R2 < R_in}.

output(R_out,C_out,V_out) :-
    input(R_in,C_in,V_in),
    pos(R_in,C_in,V_in,Pos),
    (R_out * 3) + C_out = Pos,
    output_cell(R_out,C_out),
    color(V_out).

1 { output(R_out,C_out,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R_out,C_out).

#show output/3.

final_program:
row(0).
row(1).
row(2).
col(0).
col(1).
col(2).

output_cell(R_out,C_out) :- row(R_out), col(C_out).

pos(R_in,C_in,V_in,Pos) :-
    input(R_in,C_in,V_in), V_in != 0,
    Pos = N1 + N2.
cnt_before(R_in,C_in,N1) :- input(R_in,C_in,V_in), V_in != 0, N1 = #count{R2,C2,V2 : input(R2,C2,V2), V2 != 0, C2 < C_in}.
cnt_samecol(R_in,C_in,N2) :- input(R_in,C_in,V_in), V_in != 0, N2 = #count{R2 : input(R2,C_in,V2), V2 != 0, R2 < R_in}.

output(R_out,C_out,V_out) :-
    input(R_in,C_in,V_in),
    pos(R_in,C_in,V_in,Pos),
    (R_out * 3) + C_out = Pos,
    output_cell(R_out,C_out),
    color(V_out).

1 { output(R_out,C_out,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R_out,C_out).

#show output/3.
